description_long: This is a tall, curvy glass bottle filled with a bright red juice, sealed with a light-colored screw cap that has green accents. The bottle features a large, colorful label on the front, displaying a vibrant assortment of fruits including apples, oranges, and grapes, suggesting a mixed fruit juice flavor. The label is predominantly green and white, with bold, stylized text in a non-Latin script, and includes a prominent brand logo. The back and sides of the bottle display detailed product information panels, including nutritional facts and ingredients, printed in small text. The glass surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the bottle a clean, fresh appearance. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for display in urban retail environments such as convenience stores, kiosks, or vending machines.
description: A tall, curvy glass bottle of bright red juice with a colorful fruit label and a light screw cap, featuring detailed product information panels.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle shows a nutritional information panel and ingredients list on a green and white label.
description_view_1: This side view displays a partial product information panel and a glimpse of the colorful fruit illustration wrapping around the label.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the vibrant fruit illustration and bold brand logo, making the juice flavor and branding most visible.
description_view_3: This side view shows another section of the product information panel and part of the fruit illustration, with less branding visible.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: apples, oranges, grapes, and other mixed fruits
